tools.name: activateCrisis
tools.description: Activate a new crisis protocol with severity level and description.

tools.name: loadPlaybook
tools.description: Load a crisis playbook by type for step-by-step guidance.

tools.name: mapStakeholders
tools.description: Map stakeholders for a crisis with roles, contacts, and priorities.

tools.name: draftHoldingStatement
tools.description: Draft a holding statement for a specific audience during a crisis.

tools.name: escalateCrisis
tools.description: Escalate a crisis to a higher severity level with documented reason.

tools.name: getCrisisStatus
tools.description: Get status of active crises with last update and assigned team.
